Metadata.title: Maksym & Diana — 28.06.2026
Metadata.description: Wedding invitation of Maksym and Diana. June 28, 2026, Grand Hotel Terminus, Bergen, Norway.

OurStory.title: Our Story
OurStory.subtitle: Our journey of love
OurStory.how_we_met_text: Our journey began unexpectedly, but from the very first meeting, we knew we had found something special. Through years of support, laughter, and shared dreams, our love story has brought us to this special day. We look forward to sharing our joy with you and creating many more unforgettable memories together.

ceremony.description: The beginning of our journey together

photo_session.description: Time for beautiful photos and light socializing

banquet.description: Dinner, warm toasts, and first dance

cake.description: A sweet moment of our celebration

sparklers.description: A beautiful end to the evening under the glow of lights

Location.title: Location
Location.subtitle: We look forward to seeing you here
Location.description: A historic hotel in the heart of Bergen, where timeless elegance meets modern comfort.

RSVP.success_subtitle: We can't wait to celebrate with you on June 28th.

Gifts.title: Gifts
Gifts.subtitle: Our Wishes
Gifts.intro: To keep things simple, we would be sincerely grateful for your greetings in white envelopes.
Gifts.details: These contributions will help our new family partially cover the restaurant costs.
Gifts.closing: Thank you for your understanding and support of our very first step into married life!

Footer.made_with_love: Made with love for our big day
